case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. CLIFFORD ARNETT et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED MAR-11-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARNETT, CLIFFORD
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS

LAW AND MOTION, 302 PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-28-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
RESPONSE TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ARNETT, CLIFFORD
SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ARNETT, CLIFFORD
AFFIDAVIT IN RESPONSE TO PLTF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ARNETT, CLIFFORD

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR ON NOV-29-2010. NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. CLIFFORD ARNETT APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT SET ASIDE THE DISMISSAL IN LIGHT OF THE GRANTING OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON MAR-04-2011 AT 10:30 AM FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR FILING OF AN ORDER AND JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2011, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ARNETT, CLIFFORD DOES 1-5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-30-2010
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-06-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARNETT, CLIFFORD $7,403.92 PRINCIPAL, $462.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,865.92, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ARNETT, CLIFFORD
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK HEARING SET FOR SEP-28-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
